raw_text:
Unofficial Translation by Insurance Regulator of Cambodia (IRC)

**Article 31 ..**

Insurance companies that have not paid the annual license fee as stated due date in article 23 and article 24 of this Prakas shall be subject to the administrative measures as stipulated in article 27 of this Prakas and/or are fined from 4 000 000 (four million) riels to 20 000 000 (twenty million) riels by the **IRC**.

In the case of late more than 7 (seven) days of the due date as stipulated in article 23 and article 24 of this Prakas, shall be considered as operating the insurance business without license and shall be punished according to the insurance law.

In the case of continued committing violations, the companies shall be fined in the twice amount of the previous fine and/or to be subject to the disciplinary sanctions as stated in insurance law.

**Article 32 ..**

Insurance companies that have not paid the monthly contribution as stated due date in article 26 of this Prakas shall be subject to the administrative measures as stipulated in article 27 of this Prakas and/or are fined from 2 000 000 (two million) riels to 8 000 000 (eight million) riels by the **IRC**.

In the case of late more than 7 (seven) days of the due date as stipulated in article 26 of this Prakas, shall be fined in the twice amount of the previous fine and/or to be subject to the disciplinary sanctions as stated in the insurance law.

In the case of continued committing violations, the companies shall be fined in the twice amount of the previous fine and/or to be subject to the disciplinary sanctions as stated in insurance law.

**Article 33 ..**

Provision of Single Chapter (General Provision) of the Title 1 (General Provision) and Single Chapter (Physical Punishment) of Title 3 (Physical Punishment) of Book 8 of Criminal Procedure Code shall be complied in case decision of fine is effective.

**Article 34 ..**

Individuals who are directly influenced by the decision of the **IRC** as stated in this chapter may complain in line with the procedures as stated in insurance law.

**Article 35 ..**

Administrative measures and fines as stated in this chapter do not prevent the implementation of the criminal law in force and other indemnity.

**Chapter 6**
**Transitional Provision**

**Article 36 ..**

The general insurance company business license or life insurance company business license or foreign insurance company business branch, certificate and approval letter which provided to the companies complied with Prakas No. 098 SHV dated January 17th, 2007 concerning The Issuance of General or Life Insurance Company License, shall be valid until the
